faq.title: Transparency in
faq.desc: Everything you need to know about GETVERTEX loans, processing timelines, and security protocols.
faq.q1: Do I have to pay any fee before my loan is approved?
faq.a1: No. GETVERTEX will NEVER ask you for a processing fee before your loan application has been officially approved. The 6.5% processing fee is only payable after receiving your official approval notification.
faq.q2: How long does the approval process take?
faq.a2: Our standard processing time is short once all required documents have been uploaded and verified by our team.
faq.q3: Is my personal and financial data safe?
faq.a3: Absolutely. We use bank-grade 256-bit encryption for all data transmission and store your documents on secure, encrypted servers that comply with PDPA regulations.
faq.q4: What documents do I need for my application?
faq.a4: You'll need a signed loan application form, a copy of your National ID (NIDA) or Driving License (front and back), proof of income (receipts/income report), and a signed guarantor form.
faq.q5: How is the monthly interest calculated?
faq.a5: We charge a simple monthly interest rate of 6% on the principal amount. For example, a TZS 100,000 loan would incur TZS 6,000 in interest per month.

scam.title: Guard against digital fraud.
scam.desc: GETVERTEX will NEVER request any processing fee, insurance fee, or "commitment funds" before your loan is approved and disbursed.
